attestation.title: QTT-Native CFD Solver - Tier 2 Thermal Comfort Validation

geometry.description: Open plan office with west-facing glazing

tier2_requirements.description: Thermal comfort and dead zone analysis for occupied space

criteria.name: Temperature Field Solver
criteria.requirement: Solve coupled velocity-temperature with heat sources
criteria.acceptance: Temperature field evolves with advection-diffusion + source terms
criteria.evidence: T range evolved from 16-24°C to 12-28°C over 200 steps, heat sources active

criteria.name: Multi-Inlet Configuration
criteria.requirement: Support 4-6 ceiling diffusers with specified supply conditions
criteria.acceptance: Each diffuser injects momentum and cooled air at 16°C
criteria.evidence: 5 ceiling diffusers at 6m spacing, supply temp 16°C, vorticity IC creates jets

criteria.name: Heat Source Modeling
criteria.requirement: Model distributed heat from occupants and equipment
criteria.evidence: Workstation band Q=28.7 W/m³ at desk height, temperature rising to 28°C

criteria.name: Solar Boundary Condition
criteria.requirement: West wall glazing with solar heat gain
criteria.acceptance: Time-varying or peak solar load at west boundary
criteria.evidence: Solar source Q=20 W/m³ at x=29.5-30m, y=0.5-2.5m

criteria.name: Obstacle Representation
criteria.acceptance: 50 workstations as internal obstacles or penalization
criteria.note: Currently using distributed heat source; explicit obstacles need immersed boundary

criteria.name: Temperature Stratification
criteria.acceptance: Report ΔT from floor to ceiling, identify stratification layers
criteria.evidence: ΔT = -0.80K floor-to-ceiling, -0.27 K/m gradient (cooler at top from supply)

criteria.name: PMV/PPD Comfort Maps
criteria.requirement: Calculate Predicted Mean Vote and Percent Dissatisfied
criteria.acceptance: PMV in [-0.5, +0.5] for 90% of occupied zone (ASHRAE 55)
criteria.evidence: PMV=-0.18 at seated height, PPD=5.6% (within comfort target)

criteria.name: Dead Zone Identification
criteria.requirement: Locate stagnant regions with poor air circulation
criteria.acceptance: Map regions where velocity < 0.1 m/s and age-of-air > threshold
criteria.evidence: Analysis functional, flow still developing (max v=0.28 m/s at jets)

criteria.name: Steady-State Convergence
criteria.note: Need longer simulation; 200 steps = 0.7s physical time

criteria.name: Performance Maintained
criteria.requirement: Thermal solver maintains O(log N) scaling
criteria.acceptance: < 1s per step with temperature field added
criteria.evidence: 562ms/step for coupled NS+Thermal on 262K cells (467K cells/s)

tasks: Add temperature QTT field to solver state
Solar heat flux at west wall

required.name: PMV/PPD Comfort Maps
required.format: 2D color maps at occupied height (1.1m seated, 1.7m standing)

required.name: Dead Zone Identification
required.format: Highlighted regions with poor circulation metrics
